**One bug fixed (minor)**

`/mnt/data/commons-client/src/renderer.ts` line 213 — `drawNPCBlurb` used a free variable `y` that doesn't exist in that function's scope. The local `y` is defined in the calling `drawNPC` function but was not passed as a parameter to `drawNPCBlurb`. This would cause a `ReferenceError` at runtime any time an NPC had an active blurb, making speech bubbles completely broken. Fixed by substituting `npc.displayY`, which...(truncated)
